title: Army Wives
writer: Joel Levy Jr., B. Harrison Orkow
actors: Elyse Knox, Marjorie Rambeau, Rick Vallin
plot: When Jerry Van Dyke, a young debutante, decides to marry Barney, an Army corporal, whom she met at a USO dance, her family objects and consequently, the couple are unable to obtain a marriage license because Jerry doesn't come of ...
